item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Nordic creamy chili con carne with chicken, sea buckthorn and vegetables, richwith a slight acidity, served with grilled sourdough bread, can be servedwithout bread as gluten free, and topped with fresh mizuna salad. Redonion and lemon on the side (1+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Puerto Rican pernil, slow roasted pork neck with a juicy centre and crispedges, served with plantain sweet potato mash and mojo sauce. Finished withparsley and served with coleslaw in mojito vinaigrette (6+11+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish GREEN DISH: pernil with roasted oyster mushrooms, served with plantain sweetpotato mash and mojo sauce. Coleslaw with mojito vinaigrette

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Roasted meatloaf with crispy potatoes, pickled lingonberries and rich browngravy (1+2+6+11+15) GREEN DISH: dish Dill patties with crispy potatoes, pickled lingonberries and creamy herb sauce (6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Fish of the day served with silky celeriac purée and roasted potatoes, finishedwith a rich romesco sauce with nuts (3+8+10+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Beetroot and mushroom patty with deep flavour, served with celeriac purée,roasted potatoes and romesco (8+10+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Turkey bigos with fresh cabbage and sauerkraut, slow simmered with mushrooms,white wine and spices, served with creamy mashed potatoes and parsley. Plumcompote on the side (6+13+15) GREEN DISH: Butter bean bigos with cabbage and sauerkraut, rich and balanced, served withcreamy mashed potatoes and parsley. Plum compote on the side
